decisions.rationale: The observation describes the CB11 116th Street Study Area (116th St between 5th Ave/Madison Ave and FDR, plus Pleasant Av between 116th and 120th). Its base_record_id is corridor_116th-street, and the existing registry record for corridor_116th-street already lists this observation's source_id (116_st_morningside_ave_pleasant_ave_cb11_jun2025) in its source_ids — confirming the observation was previously resolved to this record. No other registry record is a closer match. Per the rule that when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id the decision is `new`, no relinking is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: CB11 Study area: 116 th St. & Pleasant Av. – Total: 1.1 miles
